articles.title: Israeli attack kills three in southern Lebanon
articles.summary: Israeli attack kills three in southern Lebanon Middle East Eye previously reported that Israeli strikes killed at least 12 people in southern Lebanon. National News Agency is reporting that another Israeli air strike on the town of Deir ez-Zahrani in southern Lebanon has killed at least three people. Israeli military also targeted Majdal Zoun in the Tyre district as well as Sohmor and Yohmor in the Bekaa Valley on Wednesday.

articles.title: The Golden Age of IPOs is Here: IPOX's Schuster
articles.summary: Josef Schuster, founder and CEO of IPOX Schuster, joins Matt Miller on "Bloomberg Deals." SpaceX is offering 555.6 million shares at a fixed price of $135 each, which would raise about $75 billion. The stock is set to start trading on June 12. The IPO is expected to rank as the biggest ever, topping Saudi Aramco’s $29.4 billion listing in 2019. (Source: Bloomberg)
